summary: Parallel UX fixes for misleading header logo clicks, duplicate Board Copilot actions, task-filter reset/clear parity & grouping, debounced project search feedback, and coarse-pointer-sized filter-chip dismiss targets.
acceptanceCriteria: Every worker lands independently mergeable changes scoped to `pathsAllowed` with tests + lint/typecheck green on touched surfaces.
Each verifier re-runs its target's verify recipe on the worker branch and records `unit-test-verified` or concrete `verifier-blocked` evidence.
No regressions to Board Copilot hooks (`useAgent` / `useAi` dual-mount patterns) or drag-and-drop interactive-element rules from AGENTS.md.

tasks.name: fix-header-brand-affordance
tasks.scopedGoal: Eliminate the misleading/dead Pulse logo control when the user is already on `/projects`: `BrandLink` in `src/components/header/index.tsx` passes `onClick={undefined}` on that route while still rendering as `styled(NoPaddingButton)`, which reads as an interactive button that does nothing.
tasks.brief:
## Discovery (root planner)
- `header/index.tsx` ~438–449: `BrandLink` uses conditional `onClick` — on `/projects` the brand appears clickable but performs no navigation.

## Requirements
1. When `path === "/projects"`, present the brand as **non-interactive** semantics (e.g. remove button role: use `span`/`div` with same visuals, or keep `button` but set `disabled`, `tabIndex={-1}`, and honest `aria-disabled` — pick one pattern that matches the rest of the header).
2. When `path !== "/projects"`, preserve existing navigate-to-projects behavior and `aria-label`/`title` from `microcopy.header.logoLabel`.
3. Add/adjust a focused test (extend `header` tests or `src/__tests__/uiKeyboardNavigation.strict.test.tsx` / `uiQuality` suite) that asserts tab order / role: logo is **not** in the tab sequence on `/projects`, and **is** focusable/activates navigation from another route stub.
4. Run eslint/tsc; keep zh-CN untouched unless you add visible strings (prefer none).

## Forbidden
- Do not change Copilot toggles, MemberPopover, or AI hooks.

## Verify
```bash
npm install
CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false --runInBand src/components/header src/__tests__/uiKeyboardNavigation.strict.test.tsx src/__tests__/uiQuality.strict.test.tsx
npm run eslint -- --max-warnings 0 -- src/components/header
npx tsc --noEmit
```
acceptance: On `/projects`, the Pulse brand is not exposed as a redundant clickable button that does nothing.
From other routes, clicking the brand still navigates to `/projects`.
Tests cover the regression; eslint + tsc clean.

tasks.name: verify-fix-header-brand-affordance
tasks.scopedGoal: Independently verify the header brand affordance fix against its acceptance criteria and verify recipe.
tasks.brief: Check out the worker branch named in the target handoff. Re-run the verify commands from `fix-header-brand-affordance`. Confirm behaviour on `/projects` vs other routes and record `unit-test-verified` if Jest passes.
acceptance: Verifier confirms role/tab semantics match acceptance.
Verifier records a strong verification class or blocker notes.

tasks.name: dedup-board-copilot-toolbar
tasks.scopedGoal: Remove redundant Board Copilot buttons on `BoardPage`: the sparkle dropdown already exposes Ask/Brief/Open panel (`src/pages/board.tsx` ~637–681) while `Space.Compact` still renders duplicate Brief + Ask buttons (~703–733), duplicating actions and crowding the toolbar per `docs/todo/ui-todo.md` §7.
tasks.brief:
## Discovery
- Duplicate parallel entry points confuse users and waste horizontal space on narrow widths.

## Requirements
1. Keep **one** coherent Ask/Brief affordance set. Preferred direction: retain the AntD `Dropdown` Copilot menu as the single explicit control **or** keep `Space.Compact` — **not both**. If you keep the dropdown, remove the redundant `Space.Compact` pair (and ensure dropdown/menu items still call `openChatDrawer` / `openBriefDrawer` / shell).
2. Preserve localized labels and every existing `aria-label`/`microcopy` key — relocate strings if controls move; do not weaken a11y.
3. Update `src/pages/board.test.tsx` (and any AI/board strict tests) that query Brief/Ask buttons — adapt selectors/counts to the consolidated UI.
4. Verify `CopilotWelcomeBanner` CTA still opens Brief via `onCta`.

## Gotchas (AGENTS.md)
- Do not destabilize `useAgent` effects — if touching drawer open helpers, keep deps minimal.

## Verify
```bash
npm install
CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false --runInBand src/pages/board src/pages/board.test.tsx
npm run eslint -- --max-warnings 0 -- src/pages/board.tsx
npx tsc --noEmit
```
acceptance: Only one redundant-free set of Ask/Brief controls remains in the board header AI cluster.
All board tests updated and passing; eslint + tsc clean.

tasks.name: enhance-task-search-filter-actions
tasks.scopedGoal: Fix task board filter UX gaps from `docs/todo/ui-todo.md` §9: `TaskSearchPanel` renders Reset as a lone `type="text"` button (`src/components/taskSearchPanel/index.tsx` ~289–297) and omits `FilterChips`' optional `onClearAll` — unlike `ProjectSearchPanel`, users cannot clear multiple chip dimensions in one click.
tasks.brief:
## Requirements
1. Pass `onClearAll` (and appropriate label) into `FilterChips` mirroring `projectSearchPanel` when multiple chips active.
2. Improve reset affordance: wrap filter controls in a labelled region (`aria-labelledby` / `role="search"` or `fieldset` pattern) and ensure Reset/Clear-all buttons are visually grouped (toolbar divider, `Space`, or subtle bordered cluster) — goal is perceptible attachment to filters per §9.
3. Keep Reset disabled when no chips (current behaviour) unless UX demands otherwise — document choice in handoff.
4. Extend `src/components/taskSearchPanel/index.test.tsx` for clear-all + grouping markers.

## Verify
```bash
npm install
CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false --runInBand src/components/taskSearchPanel src/components/filterChips
npm run eslint -- --max-warnings 0 -- src/components/taskSearchPanel
npx tsc --noEmit
```
acceptance: `FilterChips` clear-all parity exists for tasks panel.
Reset/clear controls read as part of the filter toolbar with improved semantics.
Tests green; eslint + tsc clean.

tasks.name: project-search-debounce-loading
tasks.scopedGoal: Address `docs/todo/ui-todo.md` §9 project list row: debounce the project name filter input and surface loading/disabled feedback while `loading` is true so rapid typing and stale props do not feel broken (`src/components/projectSearchPanel/index.tsx`, consumed from `src/pages/project.tsx`).
tasks.brief:
## Requirements
1. Debounce text input updates to `setParam` (200–400ms) while preserving immediate controlled input display.
2. When parent `loading` is true, disable filter controls **or** show inline `Spin`/suffix on the search field — avoid submitting conflicting filter states.
3. Add tests in `src/pages/project.test.tsx` or a dedicated panel test using fake timers.
4. Do not break AI semantic filter slot wiring.

## Verify
```bash
npm install
CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false --runInBand src/components/projectSearchPanel src/pages/project.test.tsx
npm run eslint -- --max-warnings 0 -- src/components/projectSearchPanel src/pages/project.tsx
npx tsc --noEmit
```
acceptance: Debounced project search avoids thrashing parent queries.
Loading state disables or visibly guards controls appropriately.
Tests cover timing behaviour.

tasks.name: filter-chip-touch-targets
tasks.scopedGoal: Grow dismiss/clear chip controls to meet minimum touch targets on coarse pointers: `ChipDismiss` is 18×18 (`src/components/filterChips/index.tsx`) and violates the repo UI plan §touch (44×44 on coarse). `ClearAllButton` likely needs the same treatment.
tasks.brief:
## Requirements
1. Under `@media (pointer: coarse)`, increase tap targets to ≥44×44 CSS px (padding/HitSlop via CSS, **without** breaking desktop density).
2. Maintain circular hit styling consistent with design tokens (`theme/tokens.ts`).
3. Update/extend filter chip tests if classes/roles change.
4. Ensure dismiss buttons remain real `<button type="button">`.

## Verify
```bash
npm install
CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false --runInBand src/components/filterChips
npm run eslint -- --max-warnings 0 -- src/components/filterChips
npx tsc --noEmit
```
acceptance: Chip dismiss + clear-all meet coarse-pointer minimum sizing.
Desktop layout stays compact; tests green.
